interface.shortDescription: Common OpenHarmony development and CI workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: OpenHarmony Skills provides Codex workflows for GitCode operations, OpenHarmony CI analysis, ArkTS playground checks, C++ coding style, NAPI modules, PR review, and security code review.
